markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Automate content workflow for a client who cannot use Google Docs.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Automate the Airtable → Notion workflow using Zapier.** Airtable's native automation cannot write to Notion, making Zapier the necessary bridge.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [**Use Airtable Interfaces for client approvals.** This enables clients to interact with the database without needing paid editor seats, which they cannot access.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [**Create separate "Internal Draft" (Google Doc) and "External Draft" (Notion) links in Airtable.** This prevents sending clients the wrong version and is triggered by status changes.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [**Set up a Slack notification with a direct Airtable link.** This allows the CMS to instantly update a record's status, streamlining the review handoff.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Disjointed Content Workflow

  - [A client (Hyperexponential) cannot access Google Docs, forcing a manual, disorganized workflow across Notion, Teams, and Google Docs.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [**Goal:** Create a single source of truth in Airtable by automating content creation and status updates in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Solution 1: Airtable → Notion Automation

  - [**Tool:** Zapier, as Airtable's native automation cannot write to Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
    1.  [**Trigger:** An Airtable record's status changes (e.g., "Ready for Notion").](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
    2.  [**Action:** Zapier creates a new Notion page and populates it with content from the corresponding Google Doc.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
    3.  [**Action:** Zapier updates the original Airtable record with the link to the new Notion page.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)

### Solution 2: Streamlined Client Approvals

  - [**Problem:** Clients with "Commenter" permissions cannot interact with Airtable fields (e.g., check an "Approved" box). Upgrading them to "Editor" is not allowed, as it requires a paid seat.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [**Solution:** Use an Airtable Interface.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
      - [**Mechanism:** Share an interface with "Editor" access, while the client's base permission remains "Commenter."](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
      - [**Result:** The client can interact with the interface's fields without needing a paid seat.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)

### Solution 3: Efficient Handoffs

  - [**Problem:** Manually finding and updating records in Airtable for status changes is inefficient.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [**Solution:** Use a Slack notification to streamline the handoff.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
      - [**Mechanism:** An automation sends a Slack message with a direct link to the Airtable record.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
      - [**Result:** The CMS can click the link and instantly update the status, eliminating the need to search for the record.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:** Build the Airtable → Notion automation using Zapier.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [**Bailey:** Create separate "Internal Draft" (Google Doc) and "External Draft" (Notion) link columns in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [**Bailey:** Set up a Slack notification with a direct Airtable link for status updates.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [**Bailey:** Use the "tools" sign-in in 1Password to access Sydney's existing Zapier setup as a reference.](https://fathom.video/share/YjsrodvPk8C4kvGtMTXxPfGc8XkWufBB?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
